programme.title: Boom America

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: In the season premiere of Farm Hero, host Laura Zaspel scours the country for the best farming practices and the people behind them. Her search winds her up in Gunnison Colorado at Parker pastures. Bill Parker and his daughters are fighting desertification with their grass-fed livestock. Using a collaboration with local farmers, Bill fights against the stigma of livestock farming with a holistic approach. Parker pastures breathes new air into the concept of farm-to-table.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Ever-increasing rainfall, coupled with monocultural farming, is eradicating the topsoil in Iowa farms. With an estimate that all topsoil in the area will be gone within 35 years, the race is on to change farming culture. Elizabeth Garst and her farm are at the forefront of the fight to educate farmers and the public on the necessity of cover crops and soil health. Elizabeth’s ancestors turned Dust Bowl land into a thriving farm with morals, and she’s not stopping there.

programme.title: S1E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike delivers nonstop action with the world’s top riders. Watch Rachel Atherton, downhill champion, tear through Arrowhead, CA, Aaron Gwin, gravity master, and Steve Storey, trail innovator, dominate Trail Boik Time. Join Remy Metailler, freestyle phenom, in Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, and see Gee Atherton, enduro legend, and Dan Atherton, mountain bike pioneer, push speed, skill, and style to the max.

programme.title: S1E1 Skate
programme.desc: This episode features the inspiring story of founders Miguel and Isabel. Driven by the belief that kids should be free to just be kids, #GoProForACause partner SanSkate is making a real difference in their community. Their mission is to provide a safe space for children who enter the workforce at a young age, giving them a chance to set aside their struggles and enjoy skateboarding. The episode also showcases the very best of GoPro skateboarding, featuring incredible talent from Andrew Brophy, Sewa Kroetkov, Madars Apse, and more.

programme.title: S1E2 Skate
programme.desc: Watch the inspiring story of Mike Rogers, an all-around skateboarding star from Cocoa Beach, FL. A regular competitor at top events around the world, including the Vans Pro-Tec Pool Party, Vans Bowl-A-Rama at Bondi Beach, and the Clash at Clairemont, Mike showcases his skill, style, and dedication to the sport. The episode also features Leticia Bufoni and Cata Diaz as she shares her perspective on women in skateboarding and explains why MACBA in Barcelona has become a world-renowned destination for skaters, with its iconic plaza, unique architecture, and perfectly smooth concrete.

programme.title: S1E3 Skate
programme.desc: Experience the very best of GoPro skateboarding at MACBA, Barcelona, celebrated worldwide as the ultimate Spanish skateboarding mecca. In 2018, we teamed up with Macba Life to follow the local skating community and capture the most jaw-dropping tricks this iconic plaza has to offer. Don’t miss this unforgettable collaboration with #MacbaLife.

programme.desc: The very best of GoPro skateboarding including pro skateboarders Sean Malto, Chris Cole & Leticia Bufoni.

programme.desc: Phillip takes us to Spanish restaurant Catalunya, one of Wine & Dine Singapore’s top restaurants in 2013, helmed by Executive Chef Alain Devahive Toloso, previously of Michelin starred elBulli, to see just what makes this restaurant so special.

programme.title: A Taste of Italy with Nisha Katona
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Nisha Katona goes on a culinary journey to discover Italy's hidden foodie gems, learning the regional secrets that influence their dishes

programme.title: Mohawk
programme.desc: Kurt Neumann (The Fly, Rocketship X-M) directed this bawdy tale of a love that was louder than war drums! With a cast that includes Scott Brady, Rita Gam, and Neville Brand, the story takes place on a remote army post where an artist romances a trio of...

programme.title: McLintock
programme.desc: He likes his whiskey hard... His women soft... And his west all to himself! Inspired by Shakespeares The Taming of the Shrew (1594), John Wayne (The Searchers, Stagecoach), Maureen OHara (Miracle on 34th Street, The Parent Trap), and Patrick Wayne (The...

programme.title: Vengeance Valley
programme.desc: The sons of a Colorado cattle baron, one biological and the other adopted, resent one another and fight for control of their father's cattle empire.

programme.title: Riders of the Whistling Skull
programme.desc: The Three Mesquiteers appeared in several Republic Pictures during the 1930s, and this is considered one of their best. It's about a mysterious murder at an archeological expedition, which leads the three prairie pals into some dangerous territory. Can...

programme.title: Idaho
programme.desc: Western icon Roy Rogers, along with his trusty companion Trigger, are back for another adventure. This time, a respected judge is being framed for murder by a crooked saloon owner. Always the valiant champion, Rogers vows to clear the name of the judge...

programme.title: Loggerheads
programme.desc: A lady wishes to court a shy but highly skilled logroller.

programme.title: To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
programme.desc: Two partner prospectors sell out to the wealthy Spencer Gates and their lives take different paths.

programme.title: Claim Jumpin' Jennie
programme.desc: Claim jumper Jennie attempts to jump the mining claim of Buck Hansen near Rhyolite, Nevada.

programme.title: Mr. Godiva
programme.desc: A newspaper man bets his girlfriend's father that he can make a fortune in three days.

programme.title: The Lady Was an M.D.
programme.desc: Yvonne DeCarlo plays a doctor struggling to begin a medical practice as a woman in the 1890s.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister tries to lay a trap for a pair of slippery crooks.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister investigates when thousands of dollars of payroll money is stolen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A dying gunslinger attracts trouble to North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newspaperman's stories are responsible for a marshal's death; and his next subject is Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 13 Silent Thunder
programme.desc: Old West TV provides many of the classic westerns from the past

programme.title: Angel and the Badman (1947)
programme.desc: A notorious outlaw is wounded in a shootout and finds himself nursed back to health by a compassionate Quaker family, leading him to question his violent past and choose between his old life as a gunslinger and the possibility of peace and love

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1 E 2 - Home Ranch
programme.desc: After a cattle drive goes awry, Lucas McCain and his son Mark find themselves stranded and forced to seek help from a wealthy rancher. However, they soon discover that the rancher’s hospitality masks a dangerous plan to seize surrounding land, pulling Lucas into a confrontation where he must defend his rights and protect his son

programme.title: The Big Show (1936)
programme.desc: When an arrogant movie star goes AWOL before a major appearance at the Texas Centennial, a singing cowboy is persuaded to take his place, leading to a series of chaotic complications involving mistaken identity, vengeful fiancées, and dangerous gangsters

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 12 The Savage
programme.desc: While traveling through Shoshone territory, Adam Cartwright is ambushed by Indians and left for dead. He is rescued and nursed back to health by a mysterious mountain woman known to the tribe as the "White Buffalo Woman"—whom Adam discovers is actually a white woman named Ruth Halversen. Because the tribe believes Ruth has lost her sacred healing powers, they have sentenced her to death, but her ability to heal Adam's wounds gives her a chance to save her own life

programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element.

programme.title: Django Meets Santana
programme.desc: Framed for a bank robbery, bounty killer Django's brother, Steve is lynched. Django hunts down Sartana, Steve's supposed accomplice, but finds him innocent also. The two men seek out the real robbers.

programme.title: Django the Avenger 1969
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger appears to be on a mission of revenge

programme.title: Apache Rose
programme.desc: Roy is an oil prospector. His efforts to get drilling rights on an old Spanish land grant are countered by gamblers from an off-shore gambling boat determined to control the land (and oil) themselves.

programme.title: Lightnin' Bill Carson
programme.desc: A lawman captures the notorious "Pecos Kid", who is tried and hanged for his crimes--then starts to have doubts as to whether the Kid actually committed the crimes.
